title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 22 curation dispositioned
body: Closed claim 44f71fe4-4109-460d-bd42-df73e5970cac after processing legacy backlog batch 22 in place. Disposition: 5 items total, 1 duplicate and 4 owner-gated. Owner-gated register is now 53 items.
